# 30-Pillar Audit — Top 12 Repos (2026-06-16)

**Generated by:** parent-claude (autonomous repo-lab sweep)  
**Methodology:** File/line signal probe + 0-3 scoring rubric (0=absent, 1=minimal, 2=adequate, 3=strong/SOTA)  
**Schema source:** `repos/audit-30-pillar-template.md` (existing template, mapped to user-requested L1-L30 numbering)  
**Scoring evidence:** `/tmp/30pillar-signals.txt` (per-pillar raw counts)  
**Output target:** `repos/findings/30-pillar-{date}.md`  
**Constraint:** Did NOT modify any external repo. Read-only probe.

## 1. Schema (L1-L30)

30 pillars, four domains: Architecture (AX), Performance (perf), Quality (quality), DX, UX, Security, Ops.  
Pillars L17 (i18n) and L18 (a11y) marked **N/A** for headless backend/CLI libraries per the `n/a=3` rule for UI pillars.

| # | Pillar | Domain | Scoring criterion (abbreviated) |
|---|--------|--------|--------------------------------|
| L1 | Architecture foundations | AX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L2 | Module structure & boundaries | AX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L3 | API surface & contract | AX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L4 | Data model & state management | AX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L5 | Async/concurrency design | AX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L6 | Observability (logs/metrics/traces) | perf+ops | signal-based 0-3 |
| L7 | Performance budgets & profiling | perf | signal-based 0-3 |
| L8 | Concurrency safety & races | quality | signal-based 0-3 |
| L9 | Memory & allocation | perf | signal-based 0-3 |
| L10 | Build & release pipeline | DX+ops | signal-based 0-3 |
| L11 | CI/CD hygiene (SHA-pins, ubuntu) | DX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L12 | Test coverage & quality gates | quality | signal-based 0-3 |
| L13 | Documentation & SSOT | DX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L14 | Onboarding & contributor DX | DX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L15 | Error handling & user feedback | UX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L16 | CLI/UX & ergonomics | UX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L17 | Internationalization (i18n/l10n) | UX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L18 | Accessibility (a11y) | UX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L19 | Secret management | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L20 | Supply-chain security (SBOM/CVE) | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L21 | Threat model & attack surface | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L22 | AuthN/AuthZ (OAuth/SAML/JWT) | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L23 | Cryptography & key management | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L24 | Audit log & compliance | security+ops | signal-based 0-3 |
| L25 | Multi-tenant isolation & data privacy | security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L26 | Resource limits & rate limits | perf+security | signal-based 0-3 |
| L27 | Resilience (retries/backoff/circuit) | quality | signal-based 0-3 |
| L28 | Observability of failure modes | quality | signal-based 0-3 |
| L29 | Dependency hygiene & CVEs | security+DX | signal-based 0-3 |
| L30 | Repository governance (license/CODEOWNERS/CHANGELOG) | DX+quality | signal-based 0-3 |

## 7. Schema Source & Conflict

- **User requested:** L1-L30 numbering (this report)

- **Existing template (`repos/audit-30-pillar-template.md`):** uses L0-L29 with same 30 pillars, off-by-one

- **Resolution:** This report uses user-requested L1-L30; existing template remains authoritative for forge-teammate audit batch (`audit-30-pillar-L*.md` files in `repos/`)

- **Pillars 17-18 (i18n/a11y):** N/A for headless backend/CLI libraries; user-supplied `n/a=3` UI rule applied when no UI present


## 8. Reproducibility

```bash
# Re-run probe
/tmp/30pillar-probe.sh AuthKit Apisync Agentora AgentMCP Benchora Conft PhenoMCP phenoShared thegent BytePort > /tmp/30pillar-signals.txt
# Re-score + render
python3 /tmp/30pillar-score.py > /Users/kooshapari/CodeProjects/Phenotype/repos/findings/30-pillar-{date}.md
```

**Cost:** ~25 tool calls (one parallel probe + one Python render).  
**Latency:** probe ~30s (thegent slowest at 2037 files); render <1s.  
**Modifications:** 0 (read-only across all 10 existing repos; 2 missing repos not created).
